---
title: "\'Home life in a Confederate state\'"
---

## \'Home life in a Confederate state\'
**Date:** 1864-1865
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (November 1864-December 1865)

### Notes

By 1866 the writer was back in England, had found out that her letters had been published in the <i>MP</i> and consented to more information appearing as \'Extracts from the journal of a refugee in Georgia\' (August 1866-May 1867\').

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
